---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a concrete capability or API change
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What user problem or workflow gap does this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful behavior change.

## Why this belongs in Rewind

Explain the fit with Rewind's scope: signed `.rewind` artifacts, deterministic replay/fork, offline
verification, or debugger ergonomics.

## Constraints / tradeoffs

List any correctness, FAIL-LOUD, determinism, compatibility, or security constraints that matter.

## Alternatives considered

What are you doing today, or what other approach did you rule out?
